languages.text: "Ваша Светлость! Пришло время перейти в наступление. Теперь, под знаменем фон Валанциус и в тени крыльев {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}аквилы{/g}, мы готовы превратить Зарков в полноценный мир {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Ваша Светлость! Пришло время перейти в наступление. Теперь, под знаменем фон Валанциус и в тени крыльев {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}аквилы{/g}, мы готовы превратить Зарков в полноценный мир {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g}".

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is time to go on the offensive. Now, under the banner of von Valancius and in the shadow of the {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}Aquila{/g}'s wings, we are ready to turn Zarkov into a full-fledged world of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость! Пришло время перейти в наступление. Теперь, под знаменем фон Валанциус и в тени крыльев {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}аквилы{/g}, мы готовы превратить Зарков в полноценный мир {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is time to go on the offensive. Now, under the banner of von Valancius and in the shadow of the Aquila's wings, we are ready to turn Zarkov into a full-fledged world of the Imperium."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is time to go on the offensive. Now, under the banner of von Valancius and in the shadow of the Aquila's wings, we are ready to turn Zarkov into a full-fledged world of the Imperium."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is time to go on the offensive. Now, under the banner of von Valancius and in the shadow of the Aquila's wings, we are ready to turn Zarkov into a full-fledged world of the Imperium."

languages.text: 「貴様ら！攻勢に出る時だ。今、フォン・ヴァランキウスの旗の下、アキラの翼の影の下、我々はザルコフを帝国の完全な世界にする準備ができている！」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is time to go on the offensive. Now, under the banner of von Valancius and in the shadow of the Aquila's wings, we are ready to turn Zarkov into a full-fledged world of the Imperium."

traits.locale_text: 「貴様ら！攻勢に出る時だ。今、フォン・ヴァランキウスの旗の下、アキラの翼の影の下、我々はザルコフを帝国の完全な世界にする準備ができている！」

languages.text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! Es hora de pasar a la ofensiva. Ahora, bajo el estandarte von Valancius y la sombra de las alas del {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}Aquila{/g}, estamos listos para convertir a Zarkov en un mundo {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}imperial{/g} de pleno derecho».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is time to go on the offensive. Now, under the banner of von Valancius and in the shadow of the {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}Aquila{/g}'s wings, we are ready to turn Zarkov into a full-fledged world of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."

traits.locale_text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! Es hora de pasar a la ofensiva. Ahora, bajo el estandarte von Valancius y la sombra de las alas del {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}Aquila{/g}, estamos listos para convertir a Zarkov en un mundo {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}imperial{/g} de pleno derecho».

languages.text: “{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}！是时候反击了。如今，在冯·瓦兰修斯的旌旗与{g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}双头鹰{/g}羽翼的庇佑下，我们必将扎尔科夫建设成一个真正的{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}世界！”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is time to go on the offensive. Now, under the banner of von Valancius and in the shadow of the {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}Aquila{/g}'s wings, we are ready to turn Zarkov into a full-fledged world of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."

traits.locale_text: “{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}！是时候反击了。如今，在冯·瓦兰修斯的旌旗与{g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}双头鹰{/g}羽翼的庇佑下，我们必将扎尔科夫建设成一个真正的{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}世界！”

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Es wird Zeit, in die Offensive zu gehen. Unter dem Banner derer von Valancius und im Schatten der Schwingen des {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}Adlers{/g} sind wird bereit, Zarkov wieder zu einer vollwertigen Welt des {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperiums{/g} zu machen."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is time to go on the offensive. Now, under the banner of von Valancius and in the shadow of the {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}Aquila{/g}'s wings, we are ready to turn Zarkov into a full-fledged world of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! "Es wird Zeit, in die Offensive zu gehen. Unter dem Banner derer von Valancius und im Schatten der Schwingen des {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}Adler{/g}s sind wird bereit, Zarkov wieder zu einer vollwertigen Welt des {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperiums{/g} zu machen."

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Saldırıya geçme zamanı. Von Valancius sancağı altında ve {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}Çift Başlı Kartal'ın{/g} kanatlarının gölgesinde Zarkov'u tam teşekküllü bir {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk{/g} dünyasına dönüştürmeye hazırız."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is time to go on the offensive. Now, under the banner of von Valancius and in the shadow of the {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}Aquila{/g}'s wings, we are ready to turn Zarkov into a full-fledged world of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Saldırıya geçme zamanı. Von Valancius sancağı altında ve {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}Çift Başlı Kartal'ın{/g} kanatlarının gölgesinde Zarkov'u tam teşekküllü bir {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk{/g} dünyasına dönüştürmeye hazırız."

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie ! L'heure de l'offensive a sonné. Nous sommes prêts à faire de Zarkov un monde de l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} à part entière sous la bannière des von Valancius et dans l'ombre des ailes de l'{g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}Aquila{/g}. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is time to go on the offensive. Now, under the banner of von Valancius and in the shadow of the {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}Aquila{/g}'s wings, we are ready to turn Zarkov into a full-fledged world of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie ! L'heure de l'offensive a sonné. Nous sommes prêts à faire de Zarkov un monde de l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} à part entière sous la bannière des von Valancius et dans l'ombre des ailes de l'{g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}Aquila{/g}. »
